trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The spider shark can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Web Sense
entries: While in contact with a web, the spider shark knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

trait.name: Web Walker
entries: The spider shark ignores movement restrictions caused by webbing.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The spider shark can make a hooked claw attack, a burrowing tooth attack, and a barbed web attack.

action.name: Burrowing Tooth
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. {@h}16 ({@dice 3d8 + 3}) damage, and the target must make a {@dc 18} Constitution saving throw, or take an additional 4 ({@dice 1d8}) damage at the beginning of its turn each round. A target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Hooked Claw
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 10 ft., one creature. {@h}12 ({@dice 2d8 + 3}) damage, and the target must make a {@dc 18} Strength saving throw, or be {@condition grappled} and pulled towards the spider shark. While the target is {@condition grappled}, attacks against it have advantage.

action.name: Barbed Web Attack
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 7} to hit, range 90/90 ft., one creature. {@h}18 ({@dice 3d10 + 2}) damage, and the target is retrained. As an action, the {@condition restrained} creature can make a {@dc 18} Strength check, destroying from the webbing on a success. The effect ends if the webbing is destroyed. The webbing has AC 15; 25 hit points; is vulnerable to fire damage; and is immune to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage.

action.name: Web Net {@recharge 5}
entries: The spider shark launches webs at a 30-foot radius area within 90 feet. Each creature in that area must succeed on a {@dc 16} Dexterity save. On a failed save, the creature takes 18 ({@dice 3d10 + 2}) damage and is {@condition restrained} by webbing. As an action, the {@condition restrained} creature can make a {@dc 18} Strength check, destroying from the webbing on a success. The effect ends if the webbing is destroyed. The webbing has AC 15; 25 hit points; is vulnerable to fire damage; and is immune to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The havoc orb's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 20}, {@hit 12} to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

trait.name: Blasphemous Geometry
entries: The havoc orb's form takes on the appearance of obscene angles and planes when looked at for too long, making it difficult for other creatures to focus on it. Its AC includes its Intelligence modifier.

trait.name: Fey Charm
entries: A supernatural attraction draws fey creatures to the havoc orb. At the DM's determination, such creatures treat the orb as a friendly acquaintance, as if under the effect of a {@spell charm person} spell. A creature not naturally inclined to follow the orb can resist this effect with a {@dc 20} Charisma saving throw. With a successful save, a creature becomes immune to that havoc orb's Fey Charm.

trait.name: Geometric Vision
entries: The havoc orb's extradimensional nature allows it to see around corners and behind objects, causing its attacks to ignore half cover and three-quarters cover.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The havoc orb has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Overreaching Enemy
entries: If an enemy misses the havoc orb with an opportunity attack provoked by the orb's movement, the enemy must succeed on a {@dc 16} saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone}.

trait.name: Wild Magic Aura
entries: The havoc orb is a natural conduit for wild magic. Any creature casting a spell of 1st level or higher within 100 feet of the orb must roll a {@dice d20}. On a roll of 1, roll again on the Wild Magic Surge table (see the "Sorcerer" section in the Player's Handbook) to create a magical effect. The magical effect created cannot be affected or augmented by any ability the casting creature has. An effect that normally requires {@status concentration} does not require {@status concentration}, and lasts for its full duration. A havoc orb's spells are not affected by this feature.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The havoc orb makes two phasing claws attacks.

action.name: Phasing Claws
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 17} Constitution saving throw or gain one level of {@condition exhaustion}.

reaction.name: Deflecting Defense
entries: If the havoc orb has an enemy within 5 feet of it, it can nullify a weapon attack made against it by another creature by deflecting the attack toward that nearby enemy. The attack is made against the target enemy, and gains a +5 bonus to the attack roll. An enemy's attack cannot be deflected back against itself.

reaction.name: Magical Mettle {@recharge}
entries: If the havoc orb is the subject of a spell attack, it can ignore the effect of that attack.

legendary.name: Detect
entries: The havoc orb makes a Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) check.

legendary.name: Phasing Claws
entries: The havoc orb makes one phasing claws attack.

legendary.name: Eldritch Blast (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The havoc orb uses its eldritch blast.
